title: Fix rand_mode() on nested object variables causes Z3 solver error (#7031)
body:
Fix #7031 

Description:

- Fixed rand_mode() on nested object variables generating #x0a instead of the variable name in SMT constraints, causing Z3 width mismatch errors
- Corrected variable name resolution in V3Randomize.cpp for nested member selections in rand_mode context
- Added test: t_constraint_global_nested_randmode
